description: Boot power-on sequence for M3 MacBook Pro 14". Sequence starts from USB-C cable insertion and ends at display LOGO. Based on M1/M2 reference adapted for M3 topology.

sequence.name: USB-C Cable Insertion — 5V Default
sequence.action: USB-C cable inserted. Charger provides default 5V on VBUS.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 internal MOSFET passes 5V. PPDCIN_USBC_AON established.
sequence.next_trigger: CD3217 detects 5V on VBUS → begins CC communication

sequence.name: Charger Input Active
sequence.action: Charger input path enabled. PPDCIN_USBC_AON feeds charger IC.
sequence.enables: CHGR_AUX_OK pulled up via circuit on page 30
sequence.what_happens: Charger IC begins regulating input → generates PPBUS_AON from adapter or battery

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Established
sequence.action: Main power bus comes up. If battery connected, PPBUS_AON approx 12.6V.
sequence.prerequisite: BMU SYS_DETECT circuit (J5151 gasket via D5130/U5150) must enable VBAT output
sequence.next_trigger: PPBUS_AON present → PPVAON_PWR_EN asserted after delay (D5340/R5340/R5341)

sequence.name: PP3V8_AON — SVR AON Powers Up
sequence.action: U5700 converts PPBUS_AON → PP3V8_AON (3.8V, 30A max). Master rail for both PMUs.
sequence.next_trigger: PP3V8_AON present → SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100) begin startup

sequence.name: SPMU & MPMU Startup — PMU Rails Cascade
sequence.action: Both PMUs receive PP3V8_AON and begin generating output rails in hardware-defined sequence.
sequence.next_trigger: All S2/S1 rails stable → PMU generates enable for standalone VRs

sequence.name: UC260 (5V) & Load Switches Power Up
sequence.action: Standalone buck converter generates PP5V_S2 from PPBUS_AON, enabled by PMU GPIO signal.
sequence.next_trigger: PP5V_S2 present → load switches enabled → subsystems powered

sequence.name: SoC AWAKE Rails — DVFS Domains Power Up
sequence.action: SoC dynamic voltage domains enabled. PCPU, ECPU, GPU, SRAM come up at initial DVFS voltage.
sequence.next_trigger: All SoC domains stable → M3 OTP ready → hard start complete

sequence.name: M3 Hard Start Complete — SoC Commands CD3217
sequence.action: M3 SoC has completed OTP verification and hard start. SoC sends command to CD3217.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 reads ROM information from SPI ROM

sequence.name: PD Negotiation — 20V Boost
sequence.action: CD3217 uses CC line to communicate PD Source_Capabilities with charger. Requests 20V.
what_happens: CD3217 sends PD request via CC line

sequence.name: Protection Isolation Passes — PPBUS_AON Stabilises
sequence.action: With 20V on VBUS, protection isolation circuit passes. PPBUS_AON stabilises at battery voltage (12.6V) with charger providing full power.

sequence.name: Soft Start — SSD, BIOS, Display
sequence.action: M3 SoC communicates with SSD (NAND0), reads BIOS/firmware, executes self-checking procedures, outputs display signals.
what_happens: SoC reads SSD via NAND interface (pages 89-90)
Display power sequencer (UP710) enables panel rails
HDMI controller (UH700 Cobra) initialised if external display present
